subcodes.first_line: O thou who proclaimest the Name of God! Praise be unto God that thou hast occupied thyself with the diffusion of the divine fragrances and hast arisen to exalt [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی باسم الله حمد کن خدا را که بنشر نفحات الله مشغول شدی و باعلاء
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
